name: M&m Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter, sugar, and brown sugar until fluffy.
2. Add the eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
3. Stir in the vanilla extract.
4. In a separate bowl, mix together the dry ingredients: flour, baking soda, and salt.
5. Gradually add the dry mixture to the butter mixture, stirring until combined.
6. Fold in the M&Ms and chopped nuts, if using.
7. Drop by spoonfuls onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
8. Bake at 325°F for 12-14 minutes, or until golden brown.
9. Turn off the oven and let cool on the rack.
